TestCase z11Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_v = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_v, t1.v, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.v = follow_case_v;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive check: ensure there are at least 2 elements to sort
    if (follow_case.n <= 1) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Sort array ascending
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n - 1; ++i) {
        int minIdx = i;
        for (int j = i + 1; j < follow_case.n; ++j) {
            if (follow_case.v[j] < follow_case.v[minIdx]) {
                minIdx = j;
            }
        }
        if (minIdx != i) {
            double temp = follow_case.v[i];
            follow_case.v[i] = follow_case.v[minIdx];
            follow_case.v[minIdx] = temp;
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
